prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ABC-FIRETRUCKPOLCAR-PARENT Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 360 Degree Bump and Go Emergency Responders Fire Truck Police Car Toy Description: Your little hero will be ready to save the day with the Kidplokio 360 Degree Bump and Go Emergency Responders. Whether it's outside saving the neighborhood cat or extinguishing pretend play flames at a nearby fire, this set comes with a quick-moving fire truck or police car, making it the perfect action toy set ready to be first on the scene.

An upgrade to this classic children's toy, this fire truck toy is fitted with an extendable 360-degree rotating ladder, vibrant colors, realistic fire truck sirens, and can change directions upon contact with an object. The bump-and-go action allows the Fire truck to continually move even after hitting a wall, allowing the fun to never stop. It easily moves in all directions, forward, backward left, and right (x3 AA batteries needed but not included with purchase).

The police car is fitted with cool car doors that open and close, as well as a back hatch that hovers open and closed; the police car also features cool police car coloring and marking, transparent wheels that light up, realistic siren sound effects, and even more flashing more lights, making playtime fun and exciting.

And, built to withstand bumps and minor crashes, these toy vehicles are made of durable plastic and will stand up to lots of playtime wear and tear. No other tools or accessories are needed for operation, making them an easy and lightweight toy tote option when traveling with kids.

Let the rescuing begin. Search Terms: firetruck truck gift toys boys stockingstuffer 3+ lightup remote control rc police first responder flashing active action Christmas Hanukkah pretend play bump friction powered vehicles cars classic kids Features: - BUMP-AND-GO FIRST RESPONDERS: The fire truck or police car feature fun bump-and-go movement mechanisms, meaning if the cars bump into objects, they will recalibrate in a new direction and continue to drive! The toy rescue vehicles also feature vibrant flashing lights and realistic siren sounds - VIBRANT LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: The bump-and-go toy cars feature bright lights and realistic siren sound effects, making playtime even more fun, engaging, realistic, and entertaining for little heroes on their way to rescue the neighborhood cat or put out flames at a nearby fire - PRETEND PLAY RESCUE ADVENTURES: Both the police car and the fire truck are equipped with a 360-degree rotating feature for any daring rescue! Simply flip the power switch and watch their imagination soar as they create their own rescue adventures indoors or out (flat surface needed) - DURABLE PLASTIC MATERIAL: Built to withstand bumps and minor crashes, the bump-and-go action cars are durable plastic and stand up to lots of playtime wear and tear! No other tools or accessories are needed for operation, making them easy and lightweight toys to tote when traveling with kids - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 2lbs; Batteries: x3 AA not included; Colors: Red (Fire truck), White (Police car); Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Bump and Go Fire Truck Police Car Toy Set
